title: 2023 Alaska Ocean Leadership Awards Now Open for Nominations
summary: The Alaska SeaLife Center (ASLC) announces the opening of the nomination period for the 2023 Alaska Ocean Leadership Awards. ASLC established the Awards to recognize those who have made significant contributions to ocean sciences, education, and resource management in Alaska. Nominations for the 202...

title: Ahtna Announces Second Shareholder & Elder Dividend Distributions for 2022
summary: The Board of Directors and the Trustees of Ahtna Hwt’aene (People’s) Trust (Board) have declared a regular shareholder distribution of $6 per share, and a special dividend distribution of $9 per share, for a total of $15 per share. title: BSNC Receives Third Place PRSA – Alaska Chapter Aurora Award
summary: BSNC’s media and communications team, with Yuit Communications, was honored to receive the third place Aurora award for Diversity, Equity and Inclusion from the Public Relations Society of America – Alaska Chapter.
